onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback
Called when the fetch fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback
Called when the transaction failed for a non-race-condition reason.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback
Called when the status update fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotActionCallback
Called when the action fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback
Called when the fetch fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback
Called when the fetch fails or the document does not exist.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback
Called when the Firestore fetch fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback
Called when the write operation fails.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackSubmittedCallback
Called when the submission failed.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnRoleFetchedCallback
Called when the fetch failed.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnUserCreatedCallback
Called when the write failed.
onFailure(Exception) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnUserFetchedCallback
Called when the fetch failed.
onResult(boolean) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackCheckCallback
Called with the result of the existence check.

onResume() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.StudentHomeActivity
 
onSlotTaken() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback
Called when the slot was already booked (race condition).
onStart() - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.BookingConfirmationFragment
 
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback
Called when the transaction committed successfully.
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback
Called when the status update succeeds.
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotActionCallback
Called when the action succeeds.
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback
Called when the write operation succeeds.
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.FeedbackRepository.OnFeedbackSubmittedCallback
Called when the feedback was successfully persisted.
onSuccess() - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnUserCreatedCallback
Called when the Firestore document was written successfully.
onSuccess(Counselor) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback
Called when the counselor document is successfully fetched.
onSuccess(Student) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnUserFetchedCallback
Called when the document was fetched and deserialized successfully.
onSuccess(String) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnRoleFetchedCallback
Called when the role field was retrieved successfully.
onSuccess(String) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRepository.OnUserNameCallback
Called with the user's name, or "Unknown" if the document is missing or the lookup fails.
onSuccess(List<Appointment>) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback
Called when appointments are successfully fetched.
onSuccess(List<Counselor>) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback
Called when counselors are successfully fetched.
onSuccess(List<TimeSlot>) - Method in interface com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback
Called when time slots are successfully fetched.
